QUESTION 1 OF 4

Which ad scored highest on brand recall?

Tap the ad you think performed best.

A
B
RESULT 1 OF 4

A
B
What the data says
Heineken reached 81% brand recall, 33 points above Baťa. It's because the face, bottle, and logo appear together in one frame. When brand cues stack up, people remember the brand better.

QUESTION 4 OF 4

How much attention does the Lidl logo get?

Look at the man's face area — including the Lidl logo right behind him. What share of total attention goes there?

25%

RESULT 4 OF 4

Actual

What the data says
74% of attention lands on the man's face, and the Lidl logo sits right in the same zone, so viewers absorb it almost effortlessly. That's why Lidl reaches 81% brand recall, more than double the category average.
